name: integration_acquisition_new_party_game_mobile_app_
method: [ACQUISITION] NEW PARTY GAME MOBILE APP : WHO PICKED WHO

phases.name: scaffold
steps: Clone scripture-streak base template → rename to who-picked-who
Replace streak logic with pick-submission + session-code flow

phases.name: monetization
steps: Wire RevenueCat $2.99 premium IAP (removes ads + unlocks extra packs)

phases.name: virality
steps: Add share-result card (PNG export of who picked who + score)
Add invite-friends deeplink with session code

phases.name: variants
steps: Generate variant 2: Dating Edition (different prompts, pink theme)

phases.name: deploy
steps: Submit all 3 variants to App Store via app_store_submit.py
Create Firebase project per variant for session state
Add all 3 variants to OPS/KPI_DASHBOARD.md tracking
